prepared_order_outcome: Order 0C88D5AE (Kitchen Chana Dal, Asha Merchant / Pune): Accepted then Dispatched with tracking TRK-ASHA-411001; visible terminal state Delivered (Payment: Paid). Timeline shows Order placed → Order accepted → Order delivered.
first_friction: On Incoming Orders, Accept for the first Pending row (Delivery to: Unknown city) replaced the whole Orders page with 'Orders unavailable — Delivery details are incomplete; the order cannot be accepted.' Retry restored the list; completed a different Pending order that showed a full Pune address.
findings: Accept on a Pending list row with 'Delivery to: Unknown city' fails closed into a full-page 'Orders unavailable' error instead of a per-order message; Retry recovers the queue.
Newly published Ashirvaad Whole Wheat Atta 5kg shows correctly in the catalog table (INR 285.00, stock 48) but does not appear in the featured product cards row above.
After Accept → Dispatch reaches Delivered, the order Timeline still labels accepted/delivered steps as 'Awaiting update'.
Sign out remained visible throughout; Identity Verified / Assistant Ready stayed on.

screenshots.readback: Catalog after publish: Sign out visible; Visible products 5; featured cards show existing grocery dals; Identity Verified.
Second catalog capture same session: Product catalog active, 5 visible products, Sign out present.
Order detail 0C88D5AE after fulfill: Kitchen Chana Dal INR 119; buyer Asha Merchant / Pune; AgentGuard refund remedy still offered; Sign out visible. Page text confirmed status Delivered.
